form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Backing up quickly after was well back in the run when 10th (Fr6) over 1609m at this track beaten 19 m by Sinbinned (1:54.40) in NR up to 48 on April 2 at $9. The start before 10th (Fr3) over 1609m after showing early pace at this track beaten 85 m by Deecee Rockin (1:58.00) in NR up to 45 on March 19 at $2.30. One of the leading players on his best form.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 7th (Fr6) over 2030m at this track beaten 30 m by Grace Shannon (2:28.50) in NR up to 48 on March 28 at $3.90. Showed ability the outing before when he posted a big 6 m win as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr3) at this track (1:56.60) beating Esperanza in NR up to 45 on March 19 at $2.20 at the bell was 2nd-2.48. Rates highly and expected to bounce back.
